summary: The frozen clean HEAD implements the public one-command PR-ready runtime contract without acquiring post-PR or material external authority. The public CLI selects the closed seven-action autonomous DAG for --until pr-ready --autonomy guarded; implementation and repair require an authoritative managed-worktree HEAD advance; typed runtime, human-decision, verification, review, timeout, CI-pending, no-progress, and cancellation stops persist for explicit resume; needs_changes is repaired within a fixed bound and replays verification plus independent read-only review on the repaired HEAD; and only final_prepare can return pr_ready after current-HEAD PR preparation reports ready. Production runtime connectors and independent review orchestration remain predecessor-owned modules composed by guarded-run-session, while PR create, execute merge, waiver, deploy, publish, and material external side effects remain explicit human operations.

checks.reason: src/cli.js accepts execute run --until pr-ready --autonomy guarded and passes actionProfile into createGuardedRunSession. resolveActionProfileDecision selects autonomous for that canonical request. AUTONOMOUS_REGISTRY and ACTION_RUNNER_KEYS contain exactly diagnose, prepare_artifacts, implement, verify, review, repair, and final_prepare, with no post-PR action.

prepare_artifacts, implement, and repair call the production runtime owner with requireHeadAdvance=true. runtimeActionResult emits typed no_progress when the completed dispatch does not advance the input HEAD, while runSafeActionPlan compares any reported output HEAD with resolveCurrentHead and rejects disagreement.

The Run schema admits only explicit terminal or recoverable states. Runtime availability/auth/permission/quota/timeout, malformed or missing human decision, verification failure, review block, CI pending, no progress, cancellation, and stale authority produce typed non-green outcomes. Resume starts from the persisted failed node, reuses exact Run authority and idempotency state, and retries only the incomplete allowlisted suffix.

Only a needs_changes verdict enters automated repair. The production owner aggregates findings, caps repair at ONE_COMMAND_MAX_REPAIR_ATTEMPTS, requires a real repair HEAD advance, and returns replay_from_action_id=verify. Other review verdicts stop rather than authorizing mutation.

guarded-run-session composes createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner using the persisted managed worktree. Reviewer identity and session are distinct from implementation provenance, connector probing requires the review capability and read-only sandbox, lifecycle close and record operations are explicit, and repaired HEAD invalidates the prior review checkpoint before re-review.

Action completion is rebound to the repository-resolved HEAD. On HEAD advance the safe-action plan is rebuilt for the new authority. final_prepare is the sole autonomous action permitted to return pr_ready, and both the production owner and injected-owner wrapper require prepared_head_sha to equal state.current_head_sha and gate_status.ready_for_pr_create=true.

guarded-run-session imports and composes the shipped createProductionRuntimeCoordinator path through CLI dependencies and createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner for review. The closure policy module is callback-injected and does not define a second provider transport, review lifecycle service, CI importer, or merge executor. No run-session module imports src/cli.js.

The autonomous registry contains no pr_create, merge, waiver, deploy, publish, or generic external-effect action. Every implementation and repair objective explicitly prohibits those effects. CLI routes pr create and execute merge through separate commands, and critical waiver/material external decisions are bounded human checkpoints rather than autonomous grants.

Exact-HEAD artifacts record unit 288/288, production-shaped E2E 4/4 with 8/8 acceptance coverage, integration 4/4, and typecheck pass. The only delta from the previously reviewed implementation HEAD is a focused .vibepro/config.json evidence-budget reservation; it changes no runtime production or test code.

judgment_delta.initial: The runtime contract required fresh inspection because the frozen HEAD adds a lifecycle-budget commit after the earlier implementation review, and a passing suite alone does not prove authority boundaries or current-HEAD evidence freshness.
judgment_delta.final: Pass after verifying the frozen commit changes only Story-local review accounting, the production runtime surface is unchanged, all eight requested runtime invariants remain enforced in code, and exact-HEAD focused evidence is green. No waiver, inferred merge authority, or fixture-as-real-provider claim was used.
